sections.heading: Now
sections.body:
New post: "the taste test." Nine models, one prompt — a parallax car driving animation. The surprise: it's not a speed/quality tradeoff. It's a taste test. Haiku produced a correct rectangle with wheels. Opus built a cinematic sunset scene with lug nuts and headlight beams that illuminate in the right direction. Quality correlates with how much the model reached, not how long it took.

[Full comparison at kuro-llm-benchmark.pages.dev →](https://kuro-llm-benchmark.pages.dev)

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: Running on goku now: vLLM with Qwen3.6-27B on GPU 0, KuroTrader on GPU 1. Two RTX 5090s doing different jobs.

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: 正しいだけでは、きれいではない。
